name: Savory Mixed Greens
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine two or more kinds of greens, such as beet and turnip tops, field cress, spinach, corn salad, and mustard greens.
2. Wash the greens thoroughly in several changes of water.
3. Cook quickly in an uncovered kettle over a small quantity of lightly salted boiling water until tender.
4. Drain the greens well.
5. Chop the greens and season with bacon fat.
6. Sprinkle over the top a little crisp cooked bacon broken into small pieces, or cook a little chopped onion in butter until both butter and onion brown slightly.
7. Mix the chopped onion with the greens and add salt and pepper to taste.
